# ProLink — GitHub Project board (ModuleEvenement)

Use this file to **fill your GitHub Project board** in a few minutes.

## Create the board on GitHub

1. Open the repo: `https://github.com/medali141/Esprit-PW-2A30-2526-ProLink`
2. Tab **Projects** → **New project**
3. Choose **Board** (or Table with a **Status** field)
4. Name it e.g. `ProLink — ModuleEvenement`
5. **Link** this repository to the project
6. Add columns if needed: **Todo** · **In progress** · **Done**

## Add cards (copy each line as one item)

Create a **draft item** or **issue** per line, then drag to the right column.

### Todo (backlog)

- [ ] Finaliser les validations metier des formulaires Event/Participation (dates, capacite, contraintes de saisie)
- [ ] Ajouter des tests complets du tri et de la recherche (cas limites + resultat vide)
- [ ] Export PDF des events et participations avec verification des filtres actifs
- [ ] Revue securite: verifier les droits BO/FO sur toutes les routes du module evenement
- [ ] Ajouter section README "ModuleEvenement" (liens BO + FO + prerequis SQL)

### In progress

- [ ] Logique metier du module evenement en cours (regles de gestion + validations)
- [ ] Stabilisation recherche/tri dans la liste des events et participations

### Done

- [x] CRUD Event termine (ajout, liste, modification, suppression)
- [x] Jointure Event <-> Participation integree
- [x] CRUD Participation termine (ajout, liste, modification, suppression)
- [x] Recherche et tri ajoutes sur le module evenement

---

## Optional: use Issues instead of draft cards

1. **Issues** → **New issue** for each important task  
2. In the issue sidebar, **add to Project** and set **Status**  
3. Benefit: PRs can close issues (`Fixes #12`)

---

## Suggested assignees

Split **Todo** items among teammates (BO event, participation, tests, documentation).
